title: Tinted  Planks
description: Planks, Now with a Variety of Colors

![header](https://i.imgur.com/u14hqlx.png)

Welcome To Tinted Planks.


Plank Blocks in a wider variety of colors with more variants like slabs and stairs and fences planned. A total of 75 colors await all your building needs.


Hope You Enjoy This Simple Mod.


Feedback/Issues can all be submitted via Discord. (Issues Tab will redirect you to the Discord)



Recipes Can Be Viewed via Just Enough Items or Not Enough Items depending on your personal preference!
